templates.name: #1 — First Contact
templates.subject: Italian wines — proven in the US market
templates.body:
{{dear}}

My name is Luca Pattaro — I represent Siena Wine and Small Vineyards International, the global arm of Small Vineyards, a curated portfolio of Italian family wineries that has been successfully distributed across the United States for years through August Imports.

We are now bringing the same selection{{owner_mention}} — and the same operational model — to international markets.

For {{azienda}}, this means a single partner for a portfolio spanning Tuscany, Piedmont, Veneto, Sicily, Puglia and beyond: from Chianti Classico to Brunello, Barolo to Nero d'Avola.

Would you have 20 minutes for a call this week?

Best regards,
Luca Pattaro
Export Manager — Siena Wine | Small Vineyards International
luca@sienawine.it | +39 331 1347899
www.sienawine.it

templates.name: #2 — Follow-up (day 7)
templates.subject: One portfolio, all of Italy
templates.body:
{{dear}}

Following up on my previous email — I wanted to share a bit more about what we offer.

Small Vineyards International brings together over 20 family-owned Italian producers, carefully selected and already performing well in the US market. The range covers virtually every major Italian wine region:

• Tuscany: Chianti Classico, Brunello, Morellino di Scansano
• Piedmont: Barolo, Barbera, Moscato
• Veneto: Soave, Valpolicella, Prosecco
• Sicily & South: Nero d'Avola, Primitivo, Negroamaro
• And more to come.

All orders, documents, logistics and communication go through a single point of contact: us.

Happy to send the full portfolio and price list — shall I?

Best,
Luca Pattaro
Siena Wine | Small Vineyards International
luca@sienawine.it | +39 331 1347899
www.sienawine.it

templates.name: #3 — Follow-up (day 21)
templates.subject: One contact. One invoice. All of Italy.
templates.body:
{{dear}}

Working with multiple small Italian producers means multiple contacts, invoices, shipments and conversations. We solve that.

Through Siena Wine, {{azienda}} gets:

✔ A single point of contact for the entire portfolio
✔ Consolidated orders and shipments
✔ Full documentation support
✔ A selection proven to sell — validated by years of success in the US

We are not asking you to take a risk on unknown producers. These wines have a track record. We are simply making them available to you.

Would you like to schedule a 20-minute call to see if there is a fit?

Best,
Luca Pattaro
Siena Wine | Small Vineyards International
luca@sienawine.it | +39 331 1347899
www.sienawine.it

templates.name: #4 — Break-up (day 35)
templates.subject: Closing the loop — {{azienda}}
templates.body:
{{dear}}

I have reached out a few times without hearing back — I completely understand, timing is everything in this business.

I will not send further emails, but wanted to leave you with one thought: if you are ever looking to add a curated Italian portfolio with a proven US track record, a single operational contact, and wineries that genuinely over-deliver for their price point — we are here.

You can explore the portfolio anytime at www.sienawine.it

Wishing {{azienda}} continued success.

Luca Pattaro
Siena Wine | Small Vineyards International
luca@sienawine.it | +39 331 1347899
